behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all key paths (examples/terraform/envoy-ratelimiter/*.tf, README.md), required variables (project_id, vpc_name, subnet_name, ratelimit_config_yaml, namespace, enable_metrics), defaults ('envoy-ratelimiter', false), required resources (kubernetes_deployment, kubernetes_service, kubernetes_config_map, kubernetes_horizontal_pod_autoscaler_v2), and required outputs (cluster_name, load_balancer_ip).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (add namespace variable, conditional sidecar) but not exact code or line-level fixes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for variable names explicitly specified in instruction (namespace, enable_metrics) and presence of resources; no gold-specific helper names asserted.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute terraform init/validate/plan/show-json and parse real plan JSON, not only text grepping.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require terraform validate to pass and planned resources to reflect namespace/enable_metrics variables, which stubs cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Namespace variable, enable_metrics variable, resource existence, outputs, provider setup, README docs are all checked.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers (Gates/pass_to_pass) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces Terraform config, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and variable names match across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies the module directory (part of task domain) but not exact buggy lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch is localized to the three named files with targeted hunks, not full-file rewrites.
